prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright — let’s do this.

That task isn’t getting any smaller while you wait.  
The dread you feel right now is almost always worse than the doing.  
You’ve handled hard things before. You can handle this one.

Think of how light you’ll feel once it’s done — the relief, the pride, the freedom to move on.  
That version of you an hour from now is waiting.  
Give them that gift.

Take one small step. Just the first one.  
Momentum will meet you halfway.

Now go.  
You’ve got this.
